description:
Offered: Fall
This course provides an overview of employing analytics in business. Students will examine different levels of analytics, investigate various types of business initiatives to determine which level is appropriate, and how to plan a data analytics project. Through the use of an analytics platform, the focus will include data fundamentals, statistical thinking, and communicating with data by creating and interpreting data visualizations to make business decisions.
Prerequisite(s): Junior or Senior standing and has met the QR requirement.
prerequisites: Junior or Senior standing and has met the QR requirement.
